nasb.text: A wise man scales the city of the mighty And brings down the stronghold in which they trust.

esv.text: A wise man scales the city of the mighty and brings down the stronghold in which they trust.

cnv.text: 智慧人登上勇士的城， 傾覆他倚靠的堅壘。

ccb.text: 智者攀上勇士的城池， 摧毁他们倚仗的坚垒。

csbs.text: 智慧人攻上勇士的城， 也拿下那城所依赖的堡垒。
